justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's time preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent repeatedly offered the same unavailable options without suggesting alternative approaches until the very end of the conversation.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made an excessive number of redundant API calls, checking for availability for an entire year multiple times.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was extremely frustrating due to the agent's inability to find any appointments and its repetitive responses, leading the user to abandon the conversation and contact the bank directly.

overall_notes: The core issue seems to be a lack of available appointments in the system, which the agent handled poorly by repeatedly checking the same unavailable slots for an extended period, leading to a very poor customer experience.
